tasks.title: Design System and UI/UX Wireframes for IELTS Learning App

Implement User Authentication Module with Email/Password and OAuth
Implement Daily IELTS Study Plan Backend and Frontend
Implement Vocabulary Learning Module with Spaced Repetition
Implement Reading Practice Module with IELTS-style Passages and Questions
Implement Listening Practice Module with Daily Exercises and Transcript Features
Implement Writing Practice Module with AI Feedback and History
Implement Speaking Practice Module with Recording and AI Feedback
Implement Grammar Practice Module with Lessons, Quizzes, and Mistakes Review
Implement AI Tutor Chat Module with Mistake Explanation and Study Suggestions
Implement Dashboard Page with Progress and Recommendations
Implement User Profile Management and Settings
Implement Admin Panel for Content and User Management
Add Seed Data for IELTS Topics, Vocabulary, and Sample Lessons
Add Unit and E2E Tests for All Modules
Prepare API Documentation and Deployment Configuration
Design app architecture, folder structure, and data schema
Initialize Vite React TypeScript project with Tailwind CSS and PWA support
Implement IndexedDB data layer with schema versioning and migration
Create reusable UI components and layout system with Tailwind CSS
Implement Dashboard page with study summary cards and charts
Implement Daily Study Planner page with task CRUD and recurring support
Implement IELTS Goal Settings page with localStorage persistence
Implement Vocabulary Notebook page with full CRUD and filtering
Implement Vocabulary Review System with spaced repetition
Implement Reading Practice Journal page with session tracking
Implement Listening Practice Journal page with session tracking
Implement Writing Practice Log page with version comparison and feedback
Implement Speaking Practice Log page with cue card timer and feedback
Implement Grammar Notebook page with notes and quiz support
Implement Mistake Notebook page with mistake tracking and review
Implement Mock Test Tracker page with band progress visualization
Implement Progress Analytics page with charts and summaries
Implement Review Center page showing all due review items
Implement Global Search page with filters across all data types
Implement Import/Export Backup page with JSON data handling
Add seed data for IELTS topics, sample tasks, vocabulary, grammar, writing, speaking, and mock tests
Create standardized README.md with project overview and setup instructions
Initialize and configure git repository with standard .gitignore and commit guidelines
Add CodeGraph configuration and integration for codebase visualization
Validate project setup by running lint, typecheck, and tests
